# floating

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Floating-window surface placement: a free-floating, draggable/resizable window over a desktop wallpaper backdrop. Owns the per-tab geometry store and window chrome.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Surface.Placement`
  - Uses: `apps.Apps`, `apps.useTabs`, `apps/surface.PlacementChromeProps`, `apps/surface.PlacementDef`, `apps/surface.Surface`, `apps/surface.usePlacementStyle`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`, `primitives/tab-id.getTabId`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
